# Cash on Delivery

Cash on Delivery is offered only for convenience-store-pickup orders on the main-island. Each order has a NT$20,000 cap and incurs a NT$30 handling fee. It is not available for other fulfillment methods or regions.

[Source: payment_methods.md#cash-on-delivery]
